pi_items.source: Verified in task.json, setup_task.sh (line 96), and export_result.sh (line 8)
Verified from setup_task.sh (lines 54-57): 3 distinct dates (2023-01-01, 2023-02-01, 2023-04-01). Patient contains 'HTA' keyword (line 55: 'Patient presents with HTA').
Calculated from setup_task.sh dates: Jan 1 to Feb 1 = 31 days; Feb 1 to Apr 1 = 59 days. Average = (31 + 59) / 2 = 45.0. Comment in setup_task.sh (lines 50-51) confirms this calculation.
Verified from setup_task.sh (lines 64-66): 2 distinct dates (2023-01-01, 2023-01-11). Patient contains 'Hypertension' keyword (line 65: 'Diagnosis: Hypertension confirmed.').
Calculated from setup_task.sh dates: Jan 1 to Jan 11 = 10 days. Single interval = 10.0. Comment in setup_task.sh (line 61) confirms this.
Verified from setup_task.sh (lines 79-82): PETIT has only 1 distinct visit date (2023-05-01). Task requires 2+ distinct visit dates for inclusion. Comment (line 77) confirms exclusion reason.

Verified from setup_task.sh (lines 87-90): BLANC has 2 visits but both on same date (2023-01-01), so only 1 distinct visit date. Additionally, medical notes contain 'High BP' but NOT the required keywords ('Hypertension', 'HTA', 'Hypertonie'). Comment (line 84) confirms exclusion reason.

Verified from setup_task.sh (lines 71-75): LEGRAND has 2 distinct visits (2023-03-01, 2023-03-15) but medical notes contain no HTA keywords ('Routine checkup. No known allergies.' and 'Flu symptoms. Prescribed rest.'). Task requires HTA keywords for inclusion. Comment (line 69) confirms distractor status.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves a synthetic medical database with 5 patients. Two patients meet inclusion criteria (2+ distinct visit dates AND contain HTA keywords): DUBOIS Paul with 3 visits and 45.0-day average interval between visits, and ROUX Julie with 2 visits and 10.0-day average interval. Three patients are excluded: PETIT Sophie (only 1 visit despite HTA keyword), BLANC Jean (1 distinct date despite HTA keyword absence), and LEGRAND Marc (no HTA keywords). All ground truth values have been verified through code analysis and date calculations.
